motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution:
def longestPalindrome(s: str, t: str) -> int:
    n = len(s)
    longest_length = 0
    for i in range(n):
        for j in range(i + 1, n + 1):
            substring = s[i:j] + t[i:j]
            if substring == substring[::-1] and len(substring) > longest_length:
                longest_length = len(substring)
    return longest_length

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n^2)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
